parameters.content:
## 📌 Workflow Overview
Fetches the latest "E-commerce Market" news from Google News RSS every day at 9 AM, formats it into a LinkedIn post, and publishes it automatically.

**Flow:**
Trigger → Fetch RSS → Sort newest → Keep top 1 → Filter empty → Format text → Post to LinkedIn

⚠️ Before activating, complete the 2 setup steps in the yellow note below (LinkedIn credentials + Person URN).

## ⚙️ Setup Required
1. **Post to LinkedIn** node → open Credentials → create/select a LinkedIn OAuth2 credential (replace `REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_CREDENTIAL_ID`).
2. Replace `YOUR_LINKEDIN_PERSON_URN_HERE` in the same node with your actual LinkedIn Person URN (format: `urn:li:person:xxxxxxxx`), found via LinkedIn's `/v2/me` API call or your developer app.
3. Toggle the workflow **Active** once both are set.

nodes.name: Daily Trigger (9 AM)
nodes.notes: Runs once per day at 9:00 AM (server timezone). Change 'triggerAtHour' or add more interval entries to adjust frequency.

nodes.name: Google News RSS - E-commerce Market
nodes.notes: Pulls all current results for the search term "E-commerce Market" from Google News RSS. Edit the 'q=' query param to change topic/keyword.

nodes.name: Sort by Newest
nodes.notes: Orders RSS items by publish date (isoDate), newest first, so the freshest article is picked next.

nodes.name: Keep Top Article
nodes.notes: Keeps only the single most recent article. Increase maxItems if you want to post multiple articles per run (requires downstream changes).

nodes.name: Filter Valid Items
nodes.notes: Safety check: stops the workflow here (no LinkedIn post) if the RSS feed returned no title, e.g. empty/broken feed response.

nodes.name: Format LinkedIn Post
nodes.notes: Builds the post text: strips ' - Source' suffix from title, extracts source name, appends link + fixed hashtag set. Edit 'hashtags' or the template string to change style.

nodes.name: Post to LinkedIn
nodes.notes: ⚠️ REQUIRES SETUP: set the LinkedIn OAuth2 credential AND replace 'YOUR_LINKEDIN_PERSON_URN_HERE' with your real Person URN before activating. Posts as a personal profile (shareMediaCategory: NONE = text-only, no image/article preview attached).
